ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file containing the data */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the update applies */,
  "field_updated" INTEGER /* ID of the field that was updated */,
  "old_value" INTEGER /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" INTEGER /* New value of the field */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments about the update */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "verified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who verified the update */,
  "verification_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was verified */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "update_status" TEXT /* Status of the update (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_file_name FOREIGN KEY ("file_name") REFERENCES files ("file_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_field_updated FOREIGN KEY ("field_updated") REFERENCES data_fields ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_verified_by FOREIGN KEY ("verified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the location data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "hash_value" TEXT /* Hash value for file integrity check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" INTEGER /* Role of the user (e.g., data entry, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_permissions FOREIGN KEY ("permissions") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "data_range" TEXT /* Data range covered by the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the report was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., government, research institution) */,
  "reliability_score" INTEGER /* Reliability score of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the source data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the field */,
  "field_type" TEXT /* Type of the field (e.g., integer, date) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cases, deaths) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the field data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "field_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field update */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* ID of the field being updated */,
  "old_value" INTEGER /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" INTEGER /* New value of the field */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the field was updated */,
  "verified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who verified the field update */,
  "verification_date" TEXT /* Date when the field update was verified */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of field update (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "update_status" TEXT /* Status of the field update (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_field_updates_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES data_fields ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_field_updates_verified_by FOREIGN KEY ("verified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
